## Summary
Provide a brief summary of the changes proposed in this Pull Request, including the problem solved and the implementation details.

## Related Issues
Closes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (improving code quality or naming without changing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update (changes to docs, help guide, or templates)

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.
- [ ] Verified build is clean without warnings or errors (`make clean && make`)
- [ ] Tested locally in QEMU (`make run`)
- [ ] Tested on bare-metal hardware (mention hardware details if applicable)

## Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / help guides accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new compiler warnings
